description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage that includes a pages job. The pages job runs only on the master branch, executes the shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public, and then publishes the resulting public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact (paths: public). Use the default Docker image and no additional services. Ensure the job is assigned to the deploy stage and is limited to the master branch.
